'''Alpha Fleet''' was led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

It participated and survived [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]]. When the fleet jumped into Bilbringi, it was supposed to transmit the system's weak spots to the other waiting fleets, but the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] in turn launched the [[Mabugat kan]], which crippled several [[HoloNet relay/Legends|HoloNet relay stations]]. Alpha Fleet was then stuck in the system without reinforcements and heavily outnumbered.

It was only due to the tactical brilliance of Wedge Antilles and the timely seizure of a hidden [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] that the Fleet managed to survive the engagement.
